query: HarmonyOS ArkTS/ArkUI platform fact check. API level: 22. Stage goal: choose a valid implementation path before coding. Focus: How to read a bundled JSON file from rawfile (e.g. rawfile/recipes.json) in ArkTS HarmonyOS and parse it into objects. Task constraint: Load 18 recipes from rawfile/recipes.json at first launch, parse to domain Recipe objects. Need the exact API, whether it requires a Context/resourceManager, whether it is async (Promise), and how to decode bytes to string (TextDecoder). Must work fully offline.. Project evidence: rawfile/recipes.json exists with 18 recipe objects {id,title,category,description,emoji,gradientIndex,timeMinutes,servings,difficulty,calories,ingredients[],steps[],tags[]}. EntryAbility is a UIAbility. ViewModels are plain @Observed classes without a context. Need to load recipes on first launch with a loading state and error/retry.. Platform surfaces: rawfile resource access; resourceManager.getRawFileContent; TextDecoder / util; ArkTS JSON.parse; UIAbility context vs component context. Extra constraints: Offline only. The recipe loader may be initialized from EntryAbility (has context) or from a page. Verify whether getRawFileContent is callable from non-UI code given a context, and whether reading is async.. Check only: path feasibility at this API level; required owner/context/lifecycle/capability gate; API family traps that can invalidate the plan; fallback or blocking gap; code-observable completion evidence affected by this fact. Quality bar: a planner can write a short contract from the answer: main path, forbidden path, fallback/gap, owner/lifecycle boundary, blocking unknown if unresolved, and observable completion evidence. Return concise evidence bullets only. Use these slots when applicable: feasibility, owner_boundary, forbidden_path, version_gate, protocol_variant, fallback_gap, blocking_unknown, completion_evidence, implementation_implication. For critical slots, write `slot: none` when the fact is not applicable or not known. If sources disagree or the fact is unavailable, state the conflict or unknown explicitly; do not smooth it over. You may add extra:<name> if a critical fact does not fit. Do not invent missing facts. Max 8 bullets. Format each bullet as '- slot: fact'. No preface, headings, examples, tutorials, or steps.
